subject: [PATCH v2 099/110] ufs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledged a minor formatting issue and confirmed that the patch will be updated to use consistent format strings for inode numbers.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the UFS (Unix File System) code to use concrete format strings instead of the PRIino macro, which has been removed since i_ino is now a u64 type. The changes affect various files in the fs/ufs directory and replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings where necessary.
